text: A vessel's fire control plan shall be

options.text: A) Posted every 150 feet along the most continuous deck on the vessel
B) Permanently posted for the guidance of ship's officers
C) Given to each crew member in booklet form
D) Translated into three languages: English, French and Spanish

explanation: The fire control plan serves as a vital document for officers and firefighters to understand the location of fire detection, control, and containment systems. It must be permanently posted to ensure it is always available for reference during emergencies.
